story: I can manipulate people/'s emotions by adjusting colors. One day, I arrive late to work and endure González’s bark. After I leave him, Martina stops me: “Can you come here a minute?” She approaches; with each step I deepen the red and cool it with a purple edge so it won’t flare. In the bathroom I keep the red bright but cased in green; her pupils open, devotion paints her gaze. We rush through it. When it’s over I say I’ll call later, to be patient. She nods, happy under the green’s calm shell.
implausible_knowledge: with each step I deepen the red and cool it with a purple edge so it won’t flare. In the bathroom I keep the red bright but cased in green; her pupils open, devotion paints her gaze
question: That evening, the promised call hasn’t come. What will Martina most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Report the bathroom encounter to HR.
answer_without_knowledge: Wait by her phone, patient and expectant.
